topup_form.match_all_description: Every item in this group must be true
topup_form.match_any_description: At least one item in this group must be true
topup_form.invalid_range: The ending value must be greater than or equal to the starting value.
topup_form.enter_value: Enter a value to complete this condition.
topup_form.match_all_help: An account must satisfy every condition and nested group here.
topup_form.match_any_help: An account only needs to satisfy one condition or nested group here.
topup_form.condition_builder_tip: Build eligibility rules in plain language
topup_form.condition_builder_description: Use ALL when every item is required. Use ANY when one matching item is enough. Nested groups are evaluated as a single item in their parent group.
topup_form.readable_preview: Preview how this rule will be evaluated
topup_form.form_subtitle: Configure the amount and accounts eligible to receive it.
topup_form.schedule_time_help: Schedule times use your device's local time.
topup_form.day_required: Enter a day of the month.
topup_form.fix_conditions: Complete or correct the highlighted rules.
topup_form.not_found: This top-up configuration could not be found.
topup_form.detail_logic_help: Read each group from the top down. ALL requires every item; ANY requires at least one item.
topup_form.delete_schedule_confirm: Delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
topup_form.delete_selected_schedule_description: Delete {count} selected schedule top-ups? This action cannot be undone.
topup_form.delete_selected_system_topup_description: Delete {count} selected system top-ups? This action cannot be undone.
topup_form.main_all_rule: The account must match every rule below
topup_form.main_any_rule: The account can match any rule below
topup_form.child_all_rule: Every rule in this branch must match
topup_form.child_any_rule: Any rule in this branch can match
topup_form.condition_builder_description_one_level: Use ALL when every rule is required and ANY when one rule is enough. You can add one level of rule groups for alternative scenarios.
topup_form.required_conditions_hint: Accounts must satisfy this section before receiving the top-up.
topup_form.scenario_hint: Use scenarios for alternative ways an account can qualify.
topup_form.scenario_only_help: An account receives this top-up when it matches any scenario. Every condition inside a scenario must be true.
topup_form.must_match_all_in_scenario: Must match all conditions in this scenario
topup_form.can_match_any_in_scenario: Can match any condition in this scenario
topup_form.condition_required: At least one condition is required.
topup_form.age_whole_number_error: Age must be a whole number.
topup_form.warning_duplicate_condition: Rule {number} duplicates another condition in the same group.
topup_form.warning_broad_age_rule: Rule {number} covers the full eligible age range. Consider adding another condition if this is too broad.
